title: cephaelis schumanniana
intro: Cephaelis schumanniana, also known as Schumann's coffee tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cephaelis schumanniana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and aid in the treatment of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves in hot water, or as a decoction by boiling the roots and leaves in water, both of which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
